title: Cryptomator Hub
description: Self-hosted key management and access control server for sharing Cryptomator-encrypted vaults across teams.
installation: Cryptomator Hub is a Quarkus app that REQUIRES two companion services you must deploy separately: (1) a PostgreSQL database (provided here as the 'postgres' add-on; rotate the default cryptomator/cryptomator/cryptomator db/user/password) and (2) a Keycloak identity server (NOT in the add-on catalog, deploy it separately, e.g. quay.io/keycloak/keycloak, and import the Hub realm). Set HUB_PUBLIC_URL / HUB_KEYCLOAK_PUBLIC_URL to your real ingress URLs and configure the Keycloak realm/clients. The QUARKUS_OIDC_AUTH_SERVER_URL and HUB_KEYCLOAK_* values below point at a Keycloak you must stand up first. Use the official Setup Wizard at cryptomator.org/hub/self-hosted to generate realm config. Rotate all default credentials before exposing publicly.
